channel.title: LIBRCHAIN 区块链新闻雷达
channel.description: 每小时自动更新的区块链新闻、博客与 X 热点聚合

item.title: DOJ Seeks Forfeiture of $3.4M in USDT Tied to Ethereum Investment Scam
item.description: Federal prosecutors in Massachusetts have moved to forfeit 3.44 million USDT linked to an alleged text-based crypto investment fraud.

item.title: Bitcoin drops on Iran war uncertainty, AI tokens jump
item.description: BTC traded near $69,500 after failing to hold $71,000 as the Iran war kept markets cautious. AI tokens including ICP, FET outperformed on strong retail demand.

item.title: US seeks forfeiture of $3.4M in USDt tied to crypto investment scam
item.description: US prosecutors moved to forfeit $3.44 million in USDt allegedly tied to a crypto investment scam that tricked victims into sending Ether to wallets controlled by fraudsters.

item.title: Aave wstETH glitch forces $27M in liquidations and compensation
item.description: Capo, an external oracle solution used by Aave, triggered around $27 million in liquidations after a pricing glitch, but the lending platform said it is stepping in to cover the losses.

item.title: Oracle jumps 11% premarket as AI demand challenges 'SaaS apocalypse' fears
item.description: Cloud and AI growth beat expectations while investors grow less worried about Oracle’s debt plans and software disruption.

item.title: Bitcoin ETFs add $251M as Goldman Sachs tops XRP ETF holders
item.description: US spot Bitcoin ETFs continued their March rally, with cumulative monthly inflows reaching $1.56 billion, while XRP ETF selling eased as top holders were revealed.

item.title: Tokenized assets climb to $23.6B as investors seek always-on markets
item.description: Tokenized real-world assets have surged 66% in 2026, with funds, gold and equities driving growth across public blockchains.

item.title: Bitcoin faces ‘highly volatile’ setup as bulls eye return to $80K by month-end
item.description: Bitcoin open interest sparked a prediction of high BTC price volatility to come as $70,000 remained the bulls' key reclaim level.

item.title: Brera board approves Solmate pivot, cuts soccer teams to focus on Solana
item.description: Nasdaq-listed Brera plans to rebrand as Solmate, wind down two soccer teams and propose a 10-for-1 reverse stock split as it pivots toward Solana.

item.title: Coinbase-backed AI payments protocol wants to fix micropayment but demand is just not there yet
item.description: Agentic commerce holds promise, but data shows that x402 is still in the trial phase

item.title: Next week could spice things up for bitcoin as seven central banks face an inflation test
item.description: Seven major central banks, including the Federal Reserve, will issue rate decisions next week just as war-driven oil price spikes raise fresh concerns about global inflation.

item.title: Senate Democrats push ban on prediction market bets tied to war and death
item.description: Senate Democrats' bill would write the prohibition into federal law even as the CFTC shifts toward a more permissive stance on event contracts.

item.title: DAOs aren't doomed, they just need to evolve: Aave founder
item.description: A proposal to transfer control of Aave’s brand assets and intellectual property to its DAO failed in January, prompting debate over the protocol’s long-term direction.

item.title: ‘Adoption paradox’ in effect as Ether lags while network activity surges
item.description: Data shows that Ether price dynamics are being driven by capital flows rather than network activity growth, said CryptoQuant analyst Julio Moreno.

item.title: Bitcoin will need 17% of ‘store of value’ market to hit $1M: Bitwise
item.description: Bitcoin doesn't need to take 50% of gold's market share to reach one million dollars per coin if one is looking into the next 10 years, argues Bitwise's Matt Hougan.

item.title: Crypto, banks need to be a ‘bit unhappy’ for bill to advance: Senator
item.description: Senator Angela Alsobrooks says she’s working on a proposal to move a key crypto bill forward, but crypto and the banks will have to compromise.

item.title: South Korea’s largest crypto exchange Upbit announced it will list ICP with trading pairs against KRW, BTC and USDT. The Internet Computer protocol aims to provide native cloud computing capabilities that could replace traditional cloud services and IT infra - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiY0FVX3lxTE91d3BGMXpSZkZvSFRzX0NmZGpRcHk0ajJVaG5FQ3VPdWJhNGpZYTlXT1ZsNTQwMEMta0VuVHVuaF9XMEpFdUhoczdhN0RaN1c4ajZ0eXMyZHk2U2F3ZVpuQjdoTQ?oc=5" target="_blank">South Korea’s largest crypto exc…

item.title: Ripple to acquire Australian financial services license as APAC payments volume doubles
item.description: The company plans to obtain the license through the acquisition of BC Payments Australia, expanding its regulated footprint to over 75 licenses worldwide.

item.title: Bitcoin steady above $70,000 as IEA proposes largest-ever oil reserve release
item.description: The largest cryptocurrency gained 7% from Monday's lows as energy price fears eased, with Asian equities rising 1.8% and Brent crude dropping below $90 for the first time since the war began.

item.title: XRP Ledger transactions jump to 2.7M as price stays rangebound
item.description: Traders are watching whether support near $1.34 holds after repeated rejection near $1.44.

item.title: Bitcoin traders bet on a rally above $80,000
item.description: Many traders expect bitcoin to recover toward the $80K level between June and September, Derive said.

item.title: Democrats Introduce Bill to Ban Prediction Market Contracts on War and Death
item.description: The DEATH BETS Act would prohibit CFTC-registered exchanges from listing contracts tied to terrorism, assassination, war, or death.

item.title: Dogecoin zooms as Elon Musk announces X Money launch date for April
item.description: The payments app offers 6% yield on balances and peer-to-peer transfers inside X, competing directly with the same demand stablecoin products are targeting. No mention of dogecoin or any crypto functionality was included.

item.title: Crypto is just finance with new plumbing: Australia’s ASIC fintech chief
item.description: New regulatory frameworks weren’t needed when financial infrastructure shifted from paper to electronic records, so it isn't needed for blockchain either, argues ASIC’s Rhys Bollen.

item.title: Ethereum's on fire with record activity, but ether price and blockchain fees lag
item.description: Capital outflows, even as activity surges across Ethereum’s ecosystem, highlight the growing disconnect between usage growth and ETH’s market performance, a CryptoQuant report shows.

item.title: BREAKING : 🇺🇸 Blackrock ETF has bought $153,490,000 worth of Bitcoin. - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiX0FVX3lxTE1sY0g0NHRDOHdDcDhjZmFHREtDbFc1SGlsWTJPRXZNVFlCSm5ySTU1cVVXaTBnc1l4UjVNMGJBNUNvbm1wQlJRNWhoUE9zOXRpWElDUXB4TUp4d2dlNDdz?oc=5" target="_blank">BREAKING : 🇺🇸 Blackrock ETF has boug…

item.title: Nvidia’s Huang: AI will boost jobs as it needs trillions in infrastructure
item.description: Nvidia founder Jensen Huang says AI will create countless jobs as the buildout for the tech has only just started and will require many more workers.

item.title: Ripple Seeks Australian Financial License to 'Scale' Payments Across the Region
item.description: If approved, the license would allow Ripple to run services and bring its infrastructure into the country’s financial system.

item.title: Bitcoin is back in ‘FOMO territory’ after crossing $70K: Santiment
item.description: US President Donald Trump's recent comments about Iran helped trigger a Bitcoin rally, leading to an uptick in social media sentiment about Bitcoin.

item.title: Arthur Hayes says he’s waiting to buy Bitcoin until Fed eases policy
item.description: BitMEX co-founder Arthur Hayes said he will start buying Bitcoin when the US Federal Reserve eases monetary policy and starts printing money amid rising tensions in the Middle East.

item.title: Definitely not accurate. This is a "guess a number" list, at least for me. Bitcoin/crypto is down 50% from ATH... 🤷‍♂️ - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiYEFVX3lxTFBmaktYQ2MyNE1odV8tTERpSWtlMzVYd1V5dURSMlpIc3Rsb0hIeGl4R2Z5dFY2NXJzT2pnX1FDY2ZOOG5lQV94SUZaaExtN0ZmZTJZbTliZzdZYlhLOEJpRA?oc=5" target="_blank">Definitely not accurate. This is a "…

item.title: China Plays the Long Game in AI While US Chases Superintelligence: Brookings
item.description: A Brookings report says China’s AI strategy prioritizes efficiency, open-source adoption, and embedding AI into real-world systems.

item.title: Ripple targets April for Australian financial license via acquisition
item.description: Ripple APAC managing director Fiona Murray said there was sufficient institutional interest in Australia to warrant the costs of acquiring an Australian Financial Services License.

item.title: Quantum Computing Isn't Just Coming for Bitcoin—It Threatens Messaging Apps Too
item.description: Experts warn that encrypted chats could face a “harvest now, decrypt later” risk as quantum computing advances.

item.title: The 20 millionth Bitcoin was mined yesterday. Now there are only one million new Bitcoins to be mined, which will take over 100 years. Decentralized, inflation-proof, global money. - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiZ0FVX3lxTFAtV3FTSEd0VUQ3TnQzRnRISGtwLWlfVVRBMTVVRnZHMlVHQ3UyNnE1QU41XzZxLWdSTi1KNGpsNlE4M2VPY0FMcGhIM1U1d3JRN2FsSm5mVmotVFpDaEx6dWhubHVUd0E?oc=5" target="_blank">The 20 millionth Bitcoin wa…

item.title: Amazon Wins Court Order Blocking Perplexity AI Shopping Agent
item.description: The order sides with Amazon’s claim Perplexity accessed password-protected accounts without authorization despite users granting permission.

item.title: DeFi lending platform Aave sees a rare $27 million liquidations after a price glitch
item.description: The blockchain data flagged shows a spike in liquidations over the past 24 hours. Some observers believe the event may have been linked to a price update in an risk-oracle system that Aave uses to determine the value of collateral.

item.title: Kalshi suffers court loss in Ohio over sports betting lawsuit
item.description: The prediction markets platform argued for an injunction against Ohio authorities, claiming that federal commodities laws superseded state laws on sports event contracts.

item.title: Basketball.fun Eyes Base, Marketplace Launches as NBA Star Tristan Thompson Departs
item.description: Basketball.fun is processing refunds for those who aren’t willing to wait until the NBA-focused crypto project’s marketplace goes live.

item.title: Here’s what happened in crypto today
item.description: Need to know what happened in crypto today? Here is the latest news on daily trends and events impacting Bitcoin price, blockchain, DeFi, NFTs, Web3 and crypto regulation.

item.title: 🇮🇳 LATEST: India introduces the Blockchain India Challenge, encouraging startups to develop Web3 tools for digital governance. - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiZEFVX3lxTE85U3I5N1owSlBBdXE2SVY4bmRtWVFLb2p2Ql8yamVBajF6S2lIbWlFWUR4ZGFFNEhMUU9mMHdOaUxXNV9vNVRMdDdLdFdsN3BySmFKeGdqU3YwUWMtY20tR0t3b1g?oc=5" target="_blank">🇮🇳 LATEST: India introduces t…

item.title: Why Bitcoin Is on a Path to $1 Million Per Coin: Bitwise
item.description: Bitcoin can hit a price of $1 million per coin even with "reasonably conservative assumptions," Bitwise CIO Matt Hougan argued. Here's why.

item.title: Ether funding rate flips negative: Are ETH bears back in control?
item.description: Bearish Ether derivatives data and slowing network use weigh on ETH price, even as developers plan for faster transactions and more flexible wallet fees.

item.title: Circle shares surge as Bernstein sees upside from stablecoin adoption
item.description: Shares of the stablecoin issuer have seemingly decoupled from the broader crypto market, gaining 49% this year and doubling since early February.

item.title: Stablecoin boom could eat into traditional banks' profits, warn Jefferies analysts
item.description: Digital dollar use in payments and crypto markets may slowly pull deposits from banks, forcing lenders to seek pricier funding, a new report by Jeffries finds.

item.title: Trump Meme Coin Down 96% From Peak as President's Approval Ratings Sink
item.description: President Trump's official Solana meme coin fell to its lowest price since soon after launch as perceptions of his job performance suffer.

item.title: BitGo to custody digital assets for StableX’s $100M stablecoin plan
item.description: The collaboration will provide custody and trading infrastructure as StableX builds a $100 million digital asset treasury focused on stablecoins.

item.title: JUST IN: It is now estimated that Michael Saylor's Strategy bought over 2,000 BTC today via STRC, another new daily record 🤯 🚀 - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiZ0FVX3lxTE1pMUpjcFhRMERwUUE3eGRVblhVd2xqR0VVZmZVaDhwS21KajJuX1N6R1BrZTJUZDdKTDRFa3NpMWQxdFpZM3E5c0d0MG5DOWFhRC1keTZjN2ltU3d0QV9HS1l0Y1Bwa3M?oc=5" target="_blank">JUST IN: It is now estimate…

item.title: Meta Acquires Moltbook, the Viral Social Network for AI Agents: Report
item.description: Moltbook is a Reddit-style platform where AI agents interact with each other, spawning communities—and even a digital religion.

item.title: There's a Benchmark Test That Measures AI 'Bullshit'—Most Models Fail
item.description: BullshitBench tests whether AI models can detect nonsensical questions—or if they'll confidently answer them anyway. The results are dire.

item.title: Investment firm Multicoin bets 'Internet Labor Markets' will drive crypto’s next wave of adoption
item.description: According to the firm, the next wave of users that will onboard into crypto will be thanks to networks where users earn crypto by contributing work rather than buying tokens outright.

item.title: Senators try to unlock stalled crypto Clarity Act with compromise on stablecoin yield
item.description: As the window narrows to pass a crypto market structure bill this year, lawmakers told bankers at a Washington summit that the final bill won't risk deposits.

item.title: Polymarket and Palantir team to protect integrity of sports betting as prediction markets face key moment
item.description: The new monitoring platform aims to detect suspicious trading as prediction markets face scrutiny over insider information.

item.title: Circle could rally 60% more on stablecoin adoption, AI agentic finance, Bernstein says
item.description: Stablecoins are decoupling from crypto market cycles as they are increasingly used for digital payments, Bernstein analysts said, which bodes well for USDC issuer Circle.

item.title: JUST IN: $15 billion asset manager Bitwise publishes report titled "How Bitcoin Gets to $1 Million" 👀 "...the global “store of value” market will be ~$121 trillion in 10 years...bitcoin only needs to take 17% of the market to be worth $1 million a coin." 🚀 - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiZ0FVX3lxTE9nM1lCTHBhM05kemJXUDNFUTFhUXhHYnlWYWlwbzF0REUtek1wOFJBYTNaOEdueFc1UFlKblJhR2p1anEyeTFqUXg4aXVMMmtXVzhmY0dOXzVIRWRKak1qM3YtVDVIUzQ?oc=5" target="_blank">JUST IN: $15 billion asset …

item.title: U.S. SEC chief Atkins said bond with sister agency CFTC to include joint meetings, exams
item.description: The SEC chairman made clear that formal new ties between the U.S. markets regulators will run so deep as to include combined meetings with firms pitching products.

item.title: Why banks are moving beyond single-provider stablecoin payment rails
item.description: Insitutions experimenting with stablecoins are shifting from single-vendor pilots to multi-provider infrastructure designed for global reach.

item.title: Why crypto's privacy problem is a total dealbreaker for mainstream users
item.description: Without privacy, the industry is fundamentally mismatched with its audience and stalling mass adoption, argues Gruell.

item.title: Elon Musk's X Money App Nears Public Launch, No Sign of Dogecoin
item.description: X Money, Elon Musk's financial "everything app," is getting closer to its public launch, but Dogecoin (DOGE) doesn't have an apparent role.

item.title: Polymarket, Peter Thiel's Palantir Eye 'Surveillance Models' for Sports Prediction Markets
item.description: Polymarket will work with Palantir on developing systems for rooting out insider trading and manipulation in sports prediction markets.
